games.reasoning: Angels have started 2-0 while Houston sits at 0-2, suggesting early season form favoring LA. Houston's home advantage partially priced in, but Angels getting good value as road underdog with momentum.
Tigers perfect 2-0 start suggests strong early form while Padres struggling at 0-2. Detroit getting decent underdog value despite San Diego's talent advantage on paper.
Braves home opener with solid 1-0 start facing struggling Royals. Atlanta's superior roster depth and home field advantage make them slight value at this line.
Dodgers' 2-0 start against winless Diamondbacks creates value despite heavy favoritism. LA's superior pitching depth and home field make this line reasonable but slightly undervalued.
Even records at 1-1 but Seattle's home field advantage and typically strong pitching staff provide slight edge. West Coast home games historically favor Seattle against AL Central opponents.
